action.reasoning: Observation: alpha=0.0525 interpolation is the current best at mIoU 0.47640088, narrowly improving over alpha=0.05; alpha=0.06 was worse, so the peak is very close to 0.0525. Analysis: with only one iteration left, further training is not appropriate, but one last ultra-local interpolation test may marginally improve the deterministic validation metric; if it is worse, the previously submitted 0.0525 checkpoint remains the recorded best. Decision: evaluate alpha=0.05375 between the 26-epoch and 34-epoch checkpoints using the known-good predict.py.
